# Stage 4 — ReproScore

```{r stage-04-setup, include=FALSE}
source(file.path("..", "R", "00_atlas_setup.R"))
atlas_env <- require.atlas.checkpoint(3)
```

```{r stage-04}
atlas_env <- run_stage_04_reproscore(atlas_env)
assign("atlas_env", atlas_env, envir = .GlobalEnv)
head(atlas_env$repro_df)
```
